title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE JOSE MENCIO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ATOK, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO ITS ORIGINAL NAME OF ATOK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 3776 / 86 OG No. 9, 1621 (Feb. 26, 1990)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 6834, January 05, 1990 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE JOSE MENCIO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ATOK, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO ITS ORIGINAL NAME OF ATOK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Jose Mencio National High School in the Municipality of Atok, Province of Benguet, shall hereafter be known as the Atok National High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 9, 1989 and September 22, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: January 5, 1990

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
